title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Node and browsers to interact with the Ollama server.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package that wraps Ollama for chat, LLM, and embedding interfaces.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, model manager, multi-user, RAG, plugins).

title: ollama4j – Java Client
summary: Unofficial Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent builder APIs and streaming support.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community-built Rust crate providing strongly-typed wrappers over Ollama’s REST endpoints.

title: ollama-copilot (vscode extension)
summary: VS Code extension bringing local Ollama models inline as GitHub-Copilot-style suggestions.

title: ollama-chat-discord
summary: Discord bot that streams answers from any Ollama model via slash commands.

title: ollama-tools (PyPI)
summary: Lightweight wrapper that adds function-calling/tool support on top of Ollama chat.

title: ollama-cam (Home Assistant add-on)
summary: Stream camera snapshots to a local Ollama vision model for privacy-first image queries in Home Assistant.

title: ollama-gui (Tauri desktop app)
summary: Cross-platform desktop chat client for Ollama built with Tauri and React.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU and PVC support.

title: ollama-express
summary: Express.js REST proxy adding OpenAI-compatible endpoints (chat/completions, embeddings) over Ollama.

title: ollama-telegram
summary: Telegram bot that chats with any Ollama model; supports groups, streaming, and context windows.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that caches and serves Ollama models inside CI pipelines for private LLM tests.

title: ollama-nim-client
summary: Unofficial Nim language client for Ollama with async HTTP and streaming support.

title: ollama-rag (Streamlit)
summary: Streamlit app demonstrating Retrieval-Augmented Generation using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector DB.

title: ollama-mcp
summary: Model Context Protocol server exposing Ollama as a backend for Claude Desktop and other MCP clients.

title: Reddit: Ollama ecosystem showcase thread
summary: Community thread collecting new libraries, GUIs, and integrations around Ollama (continuously updated).
